criteria.reason: DeployController.php lines 1-5: <?php, declare(strict_types=1);, namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;.
Line 12: final class DeployController extends Controller. Lines 7-10 import Controller, AgentDeployerService, JsonResponse, Request via use.

Lines 16-22: validate() contains the exact five rules: agent_name/personality/telegram_bot_token required|string, amount_usd required|integer|min:1, allowlist nullable|string.
Line 24: single call $deployer->deploy($request->all()) captured into $result.
Lines 26-34: statusMap deployed=>201, payment_failed=>402, invalid_request=>422, telegram_invalid=>422, install_failed=>502, default 500; returned via response()->json($result, $statusCode).
store() body contains validate, one deploy() call, status map, return. Zero new/try/catch/other service calls.

handle() body has no try/catch, no new, only header read/verifier call/status mapping.

Test uses $this->app->instance(AgentDeployerService::class, new AgentDeployerService(...)) with in-file anonymous classes implementing OnChainOSClient, KiloClawHttpClient, TelegramHttpClient interfaces. Zero createMock/getMockBuilder/MockObject tokens. Orchestrator-sanctioned alternative since AgentDeployerService is final and cannot be extended.

Five public test methods declared verbatim: test_happy_path_deployed_returns_201, test_missing_personality_returns_422, test_telegram_invalid_returns_422, test_payment_failed_returns_402, test_install_failed_returns_502.
Each test uses $this->postJson('/api/deploys', ...) and $response->assertStatus($code) with codes matching AC6 table.
